title: National Center for HIV, Viral Hepatitis, STD, and Tuberculosis Prevention | CDC NCHHSTP
text:
onal Chart 
CDC's NCHHSTP consists of Offices and Divisions for HIV, Hepatitis, STDs, and Tuberculosis. 
Download 
Download Divisions and Offices 
NCHHSTP is committed to a future free of HIV, viral hepatitis, STDs, and tuberculosis. 
Partners and Programs 
NCHHSTP develops partnerships and programs to support prevention of HIV, Hepatitis, STD, and TB 
Careers 
NCHHSTP offers careers in public health, medical epidemiology, data science and more. 
Social Media 
HIV, Viral Hepatitis, STI, and Tuberculosis prevention social media updates from CDC. 
Latest News and Updates 
New National STI Data 
The overall U.S. STI burden remains substantial, but signs of progress continue. 
Sept. 24, 2025 
Injectable HIV PrEP 
Lenacapavir as PrEP demonstrates strong efficacy and no serious safety concerns in preventing HIV. 
Sept. 18, 2025 
Connections Newsletter (Issue 25-2) 
Update on CDC leadership, NCHHSTP labs, Hepatitis C Virus (HCV) module, and NCHHSTP publications 
Bicillin L-A® 
CDC has been alerted of a new voluntary recall of Bicillin® L-A. 
Connections Newsletter (Issue 25-1) 
Surveillance reports, AtlasPlus updates, get CDC printed materials, National HIV Testing Day
